title: CLI fgos một cửa + exit-code phạm trù
action: Cửa ghi duy nhất per D3/D5: src/state/store.mjs — chủ sở hữu DUY NHẤT của mọi ghi đĩa: nhận event đã validate từ fsm.mjs (cell 3), append event TRƯỚC rồi update view .fgos/state.json SAU (event thắng khi lệch; rebuild là đường phục hồi, per risk map). bin/fgos.mjs — verbs: init (tạo .fgos/), add, move (nhận --expect cho CAS), decision (log decision event), list, rebuild (dựng lại view từ replay toàn bộ log). Exit code theo phạm trù per R4, branch on code never on message: 0 ok · 2 precondition · 3 CAS conflict · 4 validation/not-found · 5 corrupt log · 1 unexpected. package.json chỉ thêm bin entry. Audience CLI: consumer không-chắc-là-agent (per CONTEXT Terms). Test CLI chạy trong thư mục tạm (cwd = tmp), không đụng .fgos/ của repo. Sửa luôn package.json scripts.test: quote glob thành node --test 'test/**/*.test.mjs' để npm test bắt cả test/smoke.test.mjs lẫn mọi thư mục con (hiện glob không quote bị sh expand sai, bỏ sót smoke — phát hiện ở cell 2).

truths: Mỗi mutation qua CLI để lại đúng 1 event mới trong events.jsonl
Mỗi phạm trù lỗi trả đúng exit code trong bảng
fgos rebuild dựng lại state.json từ log mà không cần view cũ
prohibitions: Ngoài store.mjs, không module nào GỌI ghi vào .fgos/ (events.mjs chỉ là lib nhận path tường minh, fsm/replay thuần hàm)
Không verb ready/frontier (Phase 2, out of scope)

trace.outcome: Implemented bin/fgos.mjs (single-door CLI: init/add/move/decision/list/rebuild) and src/state/store.mjs (sole disk-write owner: append event first, rebuild+overwrite view second); exit codes mapped from FsmError/WorkValidationError/EventLogError/StoreError categories per R4 (0 ok, 1 unexpected, 2 precondition, 3 conflict, 4 validation/not-found, 5 corrupt-log); fixed package.json test glob quoting so npm test picks up test/smoke.test.mjs too; added bin entry.
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "tests_inspected": ["test/state/fsm.test.mjs", "test/state/replay.test.mjs", "test/state/events.test.mjs", "test/state/work.test.mjs"],
  "tests_added_or_changed": ["test/cli/fgos.test.mjs (new, 17 cases: all 6 verbs, every exit-code category, event-count-per-mutation, corrupt-log detection, rebuild-without-view)"],
  "red_failure_evidence": "Greenfield surface: bin/fgos.mjs and src/state/store.mjs did not exist before this cell (git log has no prior commit touching either path; cells 1-3 built only the pure lib layer with no CLI or write door). Before this change, `node --test 'test/cli/*.test.mjs'` could not even run (no bin/fgos.mjs to spawn) and `npm test` silently dropped test/smoke.test.mjs due to the unquoted glob (50 tests instead of 51) — both are the 'before' this cell fixes.",
  "verification_run": "node --test 'test/cli/*.test.mjs' -> 17 passed, 0 failed. Full suite node --test 'test/**/*.test.mjs' (via npm test) -> 68 passed, 0 failed (51 pre-existing + 17 new CLI tests; npm test now correctly picks up all of them after the glob-quoting fix).",
  "deliberate_exceptions": ["No prior CLI behavior existed to capture as a running 'before': bin/fgos.mjs and store.mjs are wholly new files added by this cell."]
}
